_comment: Kafka broker IPs for SwipeNest. Port is controlled by KAFKA_PORT in .env.local (default: 19092 — INTERNAL VPC listener). privateIp: used by in-VPC app servers (swipenest-core, swipenest-consumer). publicIp: used by external scripts (load-data.js, check-data.js). Written by deploy-kafka-brokers.sh on 2026-05-14T17:12:04Z.
